creator: olevole@olevole.ru
text:
The system panics with the message
panic: No usable event timer found

KBD: stack backtrace

#0 0xffffffff808680fe at kbd_backtrace+0x5e
#0 0xffffffff80832cb7 at panic+0x187
#0 0xffffffff80b5284b at cpu_initclocks_bsp+0x3cb
#0 0xffffffff807ea0c0 at initclocks+0x20
#0 0xffffffff807e7707 at mi_startup+0x77
#0 0xffffffff807ef71c at btext+0x2c

How-To-Repeat: Just boot FreeBSD 9 with ACPI Disabled.
It does impossible boot FreeBSD in Safe mode
